name: The Ashblazing Grand Duke
description: Increases the DMG dealt by Follow-Up ATK by 20%. When the wearer uses a Follow-Up ATK, increases the wearer's ATK by 6% for every time the Follow-Up ATK deals DMG. This effect can stack up to 8 times and lasts for 3 turns. This effect is removed the next time the wearer uses a Follow-Up ATK.

pieces2.description: Increases the DMG dealt by Follow-Up ATK by 20%.
